name: Glenn Davis
subject: Live Online Poll
body:
Peter,
My campaign for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia continues
to build momentum and support.

While I am still in session during the day, my typical
evening involves at least a few hundred miles on "Mellow Yellow,"
our campaign RV, traveling to share our message of how we will
make Virginia #1 again for business and job growth.

Peter, as a personal favor to me, can you please take a
second and vote for me in this online poll?

I want to show strong, early support for the campaign.
Please take the quick online poll. Together, we can unleash
Virginia's potential!
Lastly, I'd like to take this opportunity to say how
proud I am of my supporters. The hardworking men and women of
this campaign keep me going strong each and every day, and it's
because of them that we will prevail on June 13th

In the past 7 days, our team covered 23 events across the
Commonwealth! We have more to come as our campaign continues to
build momentum.

I'm running to grow jobs and the economy, and restore
Virginia as the best state in the nation for business and job
growth. I have private sector success with growing my own
business. I have a plan to unleash Virginia's potential. Let's do
it together.

Thank you Peter,

Delegate Glenn Davis

Authorized by DAVIS for LG

subject: re: the most dangerous administration in history
body:
Let's get to work.
---
**Before our midnight deadline, pitch in $10 or more to show you're part of the movement against Trump and the GOP -- and we'll send you an Official Democratic Membership Card:

** **[PITCH IN](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c78c/4067b0a/2c6c0290e/7e7b0e0a/1598273694/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/2017-Membership1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+PITCH+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170131_lr_nd&source=em_20170131_lr_nd")**
Declaring war on the media, beginning to repeal Obamacare, reinstating the global gag rule that cuts funding from NGOs that even mention abortion, moving forward with the Keystone XL and Dakota Access pipelines, ordering construction of his signature border wall, ordering a ban on Muslims entering this country -- this administration is shaping up to be the most dangerous administration in history. And we're only a little over a week in.

Donald and his Republican pals in Congress are holding true to their campaign promise to undo all of the progress we achieved under President Obama, and then some. So we are going to have to make sure that we are doing everything we can to fight back as hard as possible. And the way that this administration is going, it'll take each of us being all-in.

Our end-of-month deadline is tonight at midnight. How much we raise between now and then will determine how we can fight back against this administration in its first 100 days -- it's that simple. Will you pitch in $10 now to make sure that we're able to take on Trump and the GOP every single day? We'll send you your Official Democratic Membership Card in the mail when you do.

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

name: Donna Brazile
subject: You are not alone.
body:
I promise that Democrats will fight for you
---
Friend --

In my wildest nightmares of a Trump administration, I don't think I ever imagined anything like the past ten days -- that our rights, our freedoms, our families, our neighbors, our values could come under attack so swiftly and so brutally.

So to all of you who are angry, or scared, or concerned about what could come next, to all of you who are marching and demonstrating, I want you to know: you are not alone.

**We see you. We hear you. And I promise that the Democratic Party will fight for you.**

As Democrats, we know that the government can be a force for positive change for the American people. We've seen it in the programs of the New Deal, in Social Security and Medicare, in the Affordable Care Act. We believe at our core that government works, and that it works best when it works for the people. That's why we spoke out so strongly when House Republicans threatened to shut down the government and Senate Republicans ground the legislative process to a halt.

But we will not sit back and allow this administration to use the powers and authority of the United States government to undermine our values, or to redefine what it means to be American. We will not permit them to replace loyalty to the Constitution with loyalty to the president.

**We will use every tool in our arsenal to fight back. It won't be easy, and we will have to reckon with the fact that the last election consolidated power in the hands of the Republicans. But I promise you that we will never stop fighting and never give up hope.**

In his farewell address, President Obama called on us to believe in our ability to bring about change. Even in this moment -- perhaps especially in this moment -- I still believe that, yes, we can change this country for the better. And, together, we will.

Donna

Donna Brazile
Chair
Democratic National Committee

It's clear, everyone. Donald Trump's pick for Secretary of Education, corporate billionaire Betsy DeVos, is unfit to do the job.
Under questioning from Senator Hassan, Mrs. DeVos admitted that she was confused about whether the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act was a federal law, and she has no understanding of the student loan programs hundreds of thousands of Americans are saddled with.
**We need a Secretary of Education who is committed to protecting our students, not an out-of-touch billionaire.[Please, add your name to tell the Senate not to confirm Betsy DeVos.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd0c/2a380d31/1424ce13/fed9b7/2819639430/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://petitions.signforgood.com/standagainstdevos?code=hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201701_devos")**
Mrs. DeVos's lack of qualification doesn't stop there. She has a track record of undermining investments in public education by supporting voucher programs that would divert taxpayer funds to private schools without accountability requirements.
Our students, teachers, and families deserve a Secretary of Education who is committed to ensuring that everyone can receive a safe, quality education, not just those at the top.

body:
Washington welcomes those who want to cross the abyss from disaster to hope. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTAzMzMyOTAS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA4MjUzNzM4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, The chaos and cruelty caused by President Trump's executive order on immigration is on full display at airports across the country, including SeaTac. It's wrong. It's un-American. And I'm fighting it tooth and nail. He's spreading hate and making our country less safe. And his incompetence is leading to confusion. I'm here to tell him that he can't do that to Washington -- and many of you are standing with me. In fact, Attorney General Bob Ferguson deserves our thanks for leading the charge to make Washington state the first state in the country to sue the Trump administration to stop the immigration order. [**Over the weekend, I spoke about this inhumane and illegal action at SeaTac. Watch the speech and see why Washington values are standing up to President Trump.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTAzMzMyOTAS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA4MjUzNzM4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0) [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTAzMzMyOTAS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA4MjUzNzM4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0) President Trump does not care about the people who have left war torn regions, who have crossed the abyss from disaster to hope. Just like he doesn't care about young DREAMers pursuing a better future. His position is frightening, to say the least. In fact, it lacks any sense of humanity or compassion. Washington believes in hope. Washington believes in freedom. Washington believes that human lives are worth more than the fear-mongering and hatred of the Trump administration. And we believe in acting on those values, so we're fighting back, at rallies across the state and now in the courtroom with a suit to stop President Trump's illegal actions. [**See why we won 't give up the fight against President Trump's horrific immigration ban.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTAzMzMyOTAS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA4MjUzNzM4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0) I know what fear can do, and I know that Americans across the country need to stand up to it today. Friend,

If you're worried about Donald Trump's intent to destroy the progressive legacy we built under President Obama, you're not alone. If you're angry about his attacks on the core values that unite us as Americans, you're not alone.

**And if you 're more committed than ever to fighting back, well, you're not alone there, either.**

name: DNC Rapid Response
subject: BREAKING: Trump announces Supreme Court nominee
body:
Meet Trump's Supreme Court nominee:
---
**Trump just nominated ultra-conservative Judge Neil Gorsuch to the Supreme Court. Add your name: tell the Senate to reject Judge Gorsuch.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Reject-Gorsuch1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170131_dnc5_sg3&source=em_20170131_dnc5_sg3")**
Friend --

Judge Neil Gorsuch, Donald Trump's newly-revealed Supreme Court nominee, has a legal history that shows a deep sympathy for corporate interests and an apparent disdain for workers.

**[Donald wants to put Judge Gorsuch in the Supreme Court seat the GOP stole from President Obama. Add your name to tell the Senate to reject his nomination.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Reject-Gorsuch1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Donald+wants+to+put+Judge+Gorsuch+in+the&utm_campaign=em_20170131_dnc5_sg3&source=em_20170131_dnc5_sg3")**

As an attorney, Judge Gorsuch routinely represented big businesses in class action lawsuits. As a judge on the Tenth Circuit, he wrote a concurring opinion in _Hobby Lobby v. Sebelius_ \-- the case that allowed employers to deny basic health care coverage to women by ruling the Affordable Care Act's contraceptive mandate was unconstitutional. He upheld a decision that denied long-term insurance benefits to a worker who sustained a work-related injury that required spinal surgery. He even dissented from a ruling in favor of a truck driver whose employer illegally fired him for abandoning a trailer with locked brakes -- so he wouldn't freeze to death.

And as a member of the ultra-conservative "Federalist Society," Gorsuch believes in severely restricting the power that federal agencies like the EPA have to regulate businesses.

It's not hard to see why Trump loves him so much -- but from where we're sitting, Judge Gorsuch has no business on the Supreme Court bench. **Add your name if you agree.**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Reject-Gorsuch1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170131_dnc5_sg3&source=em_20170131_dnc5_sg3")**
Thanks so much,

The Democrats

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c79b/4067b0a/2c616aa13/7e7be4a0/672030547/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170131_dnc5_sg3&source=em_20170131_dnc5_sg3"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c79b/4067b0a/2c616aa13/7e7be4a1/672030547/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170131_dnc5_sg3&source=em_20170131_dnc5_sg3"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c79b/4067b0a/2c616aa13/7e7be4ae/672030547/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170131_dnc5_sg3&source=em_20170131_dnc5_sg3") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c79b/4067b0a/2c616aa13/7e7be4af/672030547/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170131_dnc5_sg3&source=em_20170131_dnc5_sg3"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

body:
The response we've received from so many of you has been amazing, but it looks like we're still missing your name... | The response we've received from so many of you has been amazing, but it looks like we're still missing your name, friend.

**[Will you join Chris and sign our petition to denounce the President's Muslim ban and ask Republican leadership to stand up for the freedoms they claim to support?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b36/70cdc2ba/4742057d/397901c/2489038509/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-on-stand-against-trump-s-executive-order?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+join+Chris+and+sign+our+petitio&utm_campaign=em013117&source=em013117")**

_Begin Forwarded Message:_

> Friend,
>
> For centuries, the United States has been a beacon of hope for immigrants and refugees from around the world. We are an immigrant nation and that has always been what makes America strong.
>
> The Trump executive order banning refugees, immigrants, visitors, and -- even Lawful Permanent Residents (Green Card holders) -- from 7 Muslim countries does not represent the America you and I know and love. This order is not about making our borders safer and our vetting procedures more comprehensive. It is an outrageous and unprecedented ban that singles out individuals due to their faith.
>
> This executive action is inconsistent with current laws and it will make Americans less safe. We are gathering names for a petition to deliver a powerful message to the Republican Congressional leadership - denounce this outrageous threat to our nation.
>
> **[Join me in signing our petition to denounce the President's Muslim ban and to ask the Republican leadership to stand up for the freedoms they give lip service to. Our voices are louder together.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b36/70cdc2ba/4742057d/397901d/2489038509/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-on-stand-against-trump-s-executive-order?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Join+me+in+signing+our+petition+to+denou&utm_campaign=em013117&source=em013117")**
>
> We will fight this and do everything we can to protect our country. I am working with my colleagues in the Senate to introduce legislation to overturn this ban. Thank you to all of you who joined the rallies this weekend at the White House, Dulles Airport, BWI and elsewhere. This is the moment to act!
>
> **[Join me today in adding your name and be sure to send to five of your friends.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b36/70cdc2ba/4742057d/397901a/2489038509/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-on-stand-against-trump-s-executive-order?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Join+me+today+in+adding+your+name+and+be&utm_campaign=em013117&source=em013117")**
>
> So proud to be your Senator,
>
> Chris
>
